HEARING RE DISPOSITION OF SETTLEMENT PROCEEDS
Off Calendar Aug-18-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Matthew A. Haulk, Esq., HAULK & HERRERA LLP (415) 745-3219 mhaulk@hhemploymentlaw.com Attorneys for Plaintiff LILY MAI
Lilah Wylde,Esq., Seyfarth Shaw LLP 415-397-2823 lwylde@seyfarth.com Attorney for Defendants FSC Barber-Buffa LLC et

Courtesy copy of Plaintiff's declaration regarding disbursement of settlement is provided to Court on August 18, 2025 before the commencemt of today's hearing.

Hearing is held. discussed not argued. Court reviews Plaintiff's declaration regarding disbursement of settlement. Declaration is not contested.

HEARING RE DISPOSITION OF SETTLEMENT PROCEEDS is taken off calendar.

Visiting Judge: John M. True; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JMT)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-10-2025 Vacated

FINAL APPROVAL HEARING
Off Calendar Jan-13-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action And Paga Settlement
Off Calendar Jan-13-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF LILY MAI AN INDIVIDUAL, ON BEHALF OF HERSELF AND ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED's Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action And PAGA Settlement.

Plaintiff Lily Mai's Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action And PAGA Settlement as set out in the proposed order and proposed judgment is GRANTED, except that the court will set a hearing (not a non-appearance case review) re disposition of the settlement proceeds for August 18, 2025, at 9:00 am in this department and order Plaintiff's counsel to file a declaration re same no later than August 7, 2025, with courtesy copy provided within 24 hours of filing.

Order and Judgment are signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (301/JMQ)

Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action And Paga Settlement; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Sep-03-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Jose M. Herrera, Esq., HAULK & HERRERA LLP (415) 745-3219 jherrera@hhemploymentlaw.com
Attorneys for Plaintiff LILY MAI
Lilah Wylde, Esq., SEYFARTH SHAW LLP (415) 397-2823 lwylde@seyfarth.com Attorney for Defendants FSC BARBER-BUFFA LLC and JONAH BUFFA Individual

Hearing is held. Discussed, not ARGUED. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF LILY MAI AN INDIVIDUAL, ON BEHALF OF HERSELF AND ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action And Paga Settlement.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for preliminary approval of class action and PAGA settlement" is granted. Final Approval hearing is set for January 13, 2025 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302 Law & Motion.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
